title: equisetum hyemale f. viride
intro: Equisetum hyemale f. viride, also known as the green scouring rush, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the horsetail family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale f. viride include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
